use_cases: User authentication for gaming platforms with video background support
Social login options with Google and Twitter integration
Remember me functionality with toggle switch for session persistence
Password visibility toggle for enhanced user experience
Form validation with required field indicators
ai_summary: A dark-themed gaming login form featuring glassmorphism aesthetics with semi-transparent inputs and video background support. Includes email/password form inputs, social login buttons, and a remember-me toggle, designed for immersive gaming platform authentication experiences.
